# Growth Mechanics — Shipwright

## Built-In Virality (Implement These)

### 1. "Built with Shipwright" PR footer
Every generated PR includes a footer:
```
---
*Generated by [Shipwright](https://shipwright.vercel.app) — AI-powered deployment for GitHub repos*
```
This exposes Shipwright to every code reviewer who sees the PR. **No action needed — already in generated content templates.**

### 2. Post-generation share prompt
After generation succeeds, show:
```
"Your deployment content is ready!
Share this → 'Just used @vpkdevs' Shipwright to deploy [repo] in 30 seconds: [URL]'
[Tweet this] [Copy text]"
```
**Implementation:** Add share buttons to `app/repos/[...slug]/page.tsx` after `prResult` is set.

### 3. GitHub star gate (soft)
Before revealing full generated content, show:
```
"Love the content? ⭐ Star Shipwright on GitHub and help others find it."
[Star on GitHub] [Skip]
```
Link: https://github.com/VpkDevs/Shipwright

## Referral Program (Post-Launch)
- Give: 1 free credit per referred paying user
- Implementation: add `referral_code` to Stripe checkout metadata; track in DB
- Referral URL format: `/pricing?ref=USERNAME`

## Distribution Channels (Priority Order)

**Tier 1 (do immediately):**
- Twitter/X @vpkdevs — daily posting (CONTENT_CALENDAR_30.md)
- Indie Hackers — product listing + weekly milestones posts
- r/SideProject — launch post + monthly "update" posts

**Tier 2 (week 2+):**
- Product Hunt launch (schedule for Tuesday–Thursday 12:01 AM PT)
- Hacker News "Show HN:" post: "Show HN: I built a tool that auto-generates Vercel configs and READMEs for GitHub repos"
- dev.to article: "How I built Shipwright in 4 weeks" (drives organic SEO + backlink)

**Tier 3 (month 2+):**
- Newsletter mentions: TLDR Newsletter, Bytes.dev, JavaScript Weekly
- YouTube demo video (Loom → polish → upload)
- GitHub "awesome" list submissions

## Press Outreach — 10 Journalists/Newsletters

| Target | Type | Contact |
|--------|------|---------|
| TLDR Newsletter | Dev newsletter | https://tldr.tech/founders |
| Bytes.dev | JS newsletter | https://bytes.dev (use contact form) |
| Indie Hackers newsletter | IH community | Post on IH, they feature standouts |
| This Week in React | React newsletter | Twitter DM @Sebastien_Lorber |
| JavaScript Weekly | JS ecosystem | editor@javascriptweekly.com |
| Hacker Newsletter | HN digest | Submit to HN first (see Tier 2) |
| Product Hunt | Launch platform | Submit (see LAUNCH_SEQUENCE.md step 9) |
| DevHunt | Dev tools | https://devhunt.org |
| Peerlist | Dev community | https://peerlist.io/tools |
| Console.dev | Dev tools newsletter | https://console.dev/tools/submit |
